title: Prime Minister's Residence
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Prime Minister's Residence''' was the state home of the [[Five World Prime Minister]]. It was a gated mansion in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''
